info.title: Timetable.lol API
info.summary: Accounts, saved plans, room collaboration, feedback, events, and festival reminder push APIs.
info.description: Timetable.lol API for the festival planner. The timetable reminder flow is designed for festival grounds where mobile reception can be weak or intermittent: Web Push reminders are best-effort, clients should keep local browser reminder fallback while the page/PWA is active, cache room state, queue local room selection changes where possible, and resync when connectivity returns.

x-festival-ground-notes.connectivity: Expect weak or intermittent mobile data on festival grounds.
x-festival-ground-notes.reminders: Web Push delivery depends on device, browser, push service, and network quality. Clients should keep local timers while the timetable page/PWA is open and call /api/reminders/schedule again after selection or connectivity changes.
x-festival-ground-notes.rooms: Room state should be treated as eventually consistent. Clients should cache the last known state, persist the room clientToken, and retry queued selection changes after reconnecting.

get.summary: Check admin-only API, database, and SMTP readiness.
get.description: Requires an authenticated admin session. Returns API, database, and SMTP readiness for operations checks.

get.summary: Get public event configuration.

Get timetable data for an event.
Get cached Mixlr listener counts for public livestream counters.
get.description: Returns listener counts through the Timetable.lol API cache so browser clients do not call the Mixlr API directly. Counts are cached server-side and the endpoint is rate limited.

parameters.name: channels
parameters.description: Comma-separated Mixlr channel slugs, with or without the .mixlr.com suffix.

post.description: Persist clientToken locally so a user can rejoin the same room member after reloads, app restarts, or weak festival-ground connectivity.

get.description: Use X-Client-Token to identify the local member. Clients should cache this response for poor reception and retry state fetches after reconnecting.

get.summary: Get blocked stage colors for member color picking.
Get the VAPID public key for Web Push reminders.
get.description: When enabled is false, clients should use local browser reminder timers only.

post.summary: Save or refresh a Web Push subscription.
post.description: The subscription may be linked to the logged-in account when a valid session cookie is present.

delete.summary: Disable a Web Push subscription and cancel pending reminders.

post.summary: Schedule server-side Web Push reminders for a device subscription.
post.description: Replaces pending reminders for the same subscription and event. On festival grounds, clients should call this after each selection change when online and keep local timers as fallback because push delivery can be delayed by weak reception.

IncludeEmptyQuery.name: includeEmpty
IncludeEmptyQuery.description: When false, only artists with timetable bookings are returned.

YoutubeUrlQuery.name: url
YoutubeUrlQuery.description: Alternative to videoId. The API extracts the YouTube video id from the URL.

SpotifyMarketQuery.name: market
SpotifyMarketQuery.description: Optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 market code for Spotify search.

PlannerDataUpdate.description: Full planner data payload. eventSlug in the path is authoritative.

RoomStateWithMe.description: Room state and current member response.

LivestreamChatMuteClearResponse.description: Cleared livestream chat mute or ban.

ticketUrl.description: Primary ticket or website URL shown on event cards.

ticketLabel.description: Label for ticketUrl. Clients default to Tickets when omitted.

ticketStatus.description: Controls the primary ticket button. sold_out renders a disabled Sold out button; closed renders a disabled Closed button; hidden suppresses it.

resaleTicketUrl.description: Optional resale URL shown on event cards.

resaleTicketLabel.description: Label for resaleTicketUrl. Clients default to Resale when omitted.

resaleTicketStatus.description: Controls the resale button. sold_out renders a disabled Sold out button; closed renders a disabled Closed button; hidden suppresses it.

location.description: Festival location shown in event data.

password.description: Required when joining an invite_only room unless this client is already a member.
Required when changing a public room to invite_only without an existing password; optional for rotating an invite_only room password.

oneOf.description: [stableId, start, end, artist]. Leave start and end blank together for non-timed lineup, host, or MC rows.

id.description: Spotify artist id, or a local: prefixed id for timetable-only artists.
